name: zolai
description: > **Vision:** To ensure the Zolai language thrives in the AI era by building a fully capable "Zolai AI Second Brain"—allowing the Zomi people to learn, work, and interact with cutting-edge technology entirely in their native tongue. >  > **Mission:** To digitize, standardize, and preserve the Zolai language through automated data-harvesting pipelines, creating high-purity bilingual datasets, and fine-tuning open-source Large Language Models (LLMs) to understand and generate fluent Tedim Zolai.
author: Peter Pau Sian Lian <peterpausianlian2020@gmail.com>
